artPrompt: The dramatic moment of a botched ascension: a cluster of ashen-robed congregants rise weightlessly into a column of cold gold light, limbs splayed in awkward floating gestures, while one lone figure remains stubbornly earthbound below, arms still reaching. Candle smoke spirals up toward a looming clock tower. Wide landscape lift, bone white and gold washes bleeding into blood-dark black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Rapture Rehearsal
text:
Exile any number of target creatures you control, then return them to the battlefield under their owners' control at the beginning of the next end step. A dry run for the ascension. Please return your tray tables to the upright position.
For each creature exiled this way, remove a doom counter from the Doomsday Clock.
flavorText: "Okay, on three, everyone float upward. One... two... and we're floating. We are floating. Greg, you're not floating."
